ddls:
CREATE TABLE "events" (
  "event_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event */,
  "event_name" TEXT /* Name of the event */,
  "event_type" INTEGER /* Type of event (e.g., workshop, meeting, assembly) */,
  "event_date" TEXT /* Date of the event */,
  "event_time" TEXT /* Time of the event */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location where the event is held */,
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the organizer who scheduled the event */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Maximum number of participants allowed */,
  "registration_open_date" TEXT /* Date when registration opens */,
  "registration_close_date" TEXT /* Date when registration closes */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the event */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the event */,
  "event_url" TEXT /* URL for more information or to register for the event */,
  "recurrence" TEXT /* Information about whether the event is recurring and its frequency */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_event_type FOREIGN KEY ("event_type") REFERENCES event_types ("event_type_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_events_organizer_id FOREIGN KEY ("organizer_id") REFERENCES event_organizers ("organizer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_organizers" (
  "organizer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each organizer */,
  "organizer_name" TEXT /* Full name of the organizer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the organizer */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the organizer belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the organizer */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position or role of the organizer within the school */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the organizer's profile or bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("organizer_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_organizers_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "schools" (
  "school_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each school */,
  "school_name" TEXT /* Name of the school */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the school */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the school */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the school */,
  "website" TEXT /* URL to the school's website */,
  "principal_name" TEXT /* Name of the school principal */,
  "principal_email" TEXT /* Email of the school principal */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "participants" (
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each participant */,
  "participant_name" TEXT /* Full name of the participant */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the participant */,
  "school_id" INTEGER /* ID of the school the participant belongs to */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number of the participant */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the participant */,
  "profile_url" TEXT /* URL to the participant's profile or bio */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_participants_school_id FOREIGN KEY ("school_id") REFERENCES schools ("school_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_participants" (
  "event_participant_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event registration */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "registration_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant registered for the event */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the participant's registration */,
  "check_in_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant checked in */,
  "check_out_time" TEXT /* Time when the participant checked out */,
  "feedback" TEXT /* Feedback provided by the participant after the event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_participant_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_participants_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_types" (
  "event_type_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each event type */,
  "event_type_name" TEXT /* Name of the event type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the event type */,
  "duration" TEXT /* Typical duration of events of this type */,
  "frequency" TEXT /* Frequency of events of this type */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("event_type_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "invitation_lists" (
  "invitation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each invitation */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the event */,
  "participant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the participant */,
  "invitation_date" TEXT /* Date when the invitation was sent */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the invitation */,
  "response_date" TEXT /* Date when the participant responded to the invitation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("invitation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invitation_lists_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_invitation_lists_participant_id FOREIGN KEY ("participant_id") REFERENCES participants ("participant_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "event_conflicts" (
  "conflict_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each scheduling conflict */,
  "event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the original event */,
  "conflicting_event_id" INTEGER /* ID of the conflicting event */,
  "conflict_description" TEXT /* Description of the conflict */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the conflict was resolved */,
  "resolution_description" TEXT /* Description of how the conflict was resolved */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("conflict_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_conflicts_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_event_conflicts_conflicting_event_id FOREIGN KEY ("conflicting_event_id") REFERENCES events ("event_id")
)
